headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann's LaLiga career ended in disappointment as Villarreal tore Atlético Madrid apart to clinch third place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Villarreal thrash Atleti in Griezmann's last game

video.headline: Villarreal finish in third after thrashing Atlético Madrid 5-1

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Villarreal finish in third after thrashing Atlético Madrid 5-1) 2026/05/24 ESHEET

headlines.description: Álvaro Arbeloa signed off as Real Madrid coach with a 4-2 win over Athletic Bilbao at the Bernabéu.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid beat Athletic Club on night of farewells

video.headline: Bellingham & Mbappe score as Real Madrid end with a win

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Bellingham & Mbappe score as Real Madrid end with a win) 2026/05/23

headlines.description: Valencia scored twice in the space of five second-half minutes as they came from behind to beat LaLiga champions Barcelona 3-1, although it was not enough to earn them European qualification on the final day of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lewandowski scores in farewell as Barcelona lose

video.headline: Lewandowski signs off with a goal as Barcelona end with Valencia defeat

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Lewandowski signs off with a goal as Barcelona end with Valencia defeat) 2026/05/23

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann set up the only goal against Girona before bidding an emotional farewell to the Atlético Madrid home crowd.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antoine Griezmann sets up Atlético winner on final home appearance

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Atlético Madrid beats Girona 1-0) 2026/05/17 ESHEET

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Giuliano Simeone (Atletico Madrid) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Villarreal 1, Atletico Madrid 0. Dani Parejo (Villarreal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Villarreal 2, Atletico Madrid 0. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 0. Georges Mikautadze (Villarreal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ayoze Pérez following a fast break.
Goal! Villarreal 3, Atletico Madrid 1. Marc Pubill (Atletico Madrid) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1. Pape Gueye (Villarreal) left footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
First Half ends, Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Alexander Sørloth replaces Giuliano Simeone.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Aleksa Puric replaces Dávid Hancko.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Matteo Ruggeri replaces Marc Pubill.
Second Half begins Villarreal 4, Atletico Madrid 1.
Goal! Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1. Ayoze Pérez (Villarreal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Boñar replaces Ademola Lookman.
Substitution, Atletico Madrid. Javier Morcillo replaces Álex Baena.
Substitution, Villarreal. Alassane Diatta replaces Dani Parejo.
Substitution, Villarreal. Sergi Cardona replaces Alfonso Pedraza.
Substitution, Villarreal. Logan Costa replaces Pape Gueye.
Substitution, Villarreal. Pau Cabanes replaces Ayoze Pérez.
Substitution, Villarreal. Carlos Macià replaces Georges Mikautadze because of an injury.
Second Half ends, Villarreal 5, Atletico Madrid 1.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 0. Toni Martínez (Alaves) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Alaves. Carlos Protesoni replaces Victor Parada because of an injury.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Sergio Camello replaces Carlos Martín because of an injury.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Jorge de Frutos replaces Álvaro García.
Second Half begins Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 0.
Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Alemão replaces Óscar Valentín.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Pathé Ciss replaces Abdul Mumin.
Pathé Ciss (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ángel Pérez (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 1. Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pathé Ciss.
Substitution, Alaves. Denis Suárez replaces Pablo Ibáñez.
Abde Rebbach (Alaves) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Alaves. Ander Guevara replaces Jon Guridi.
Substitution, Alaves. Ibrahim Diabate replaces Lucas Boyé.
Nahuel Tenaglia (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Andrei Ratiu replaces Iván Balliu.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 2. Randy Nteka (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Sergio Camello.
Pacha Espino (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 2.
